stories.title: AUSL Final Day — OKC Spark Crashes the Party, Cascade Is Out
stories.angle: The Cascade were supposed to be in. The Spark made sure they weren't. The final day of the AUSL regular season delivered the kind of last-game drama that proves the league is for real.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Oklahoma City Spark just ended Portland Cascade's season.

OKC beat the Carolina Blaze on the final day of the AUSL regular season to clinch the No. 3 seed.

Cascade is out. The bracket is set.

This is what the last day of a season is supposed to feel like. #AUSL #softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
AUSL bracket FINAL:

No. 1 Utah Talons — bye to Championship
No. 2 Chicago Bandits — play-in Thursday
No. 3 OKC Spark — play-in Thursday

Portland Cascade: ELIMINATED on the final day.

Championship at Davis Diamond. Game 1 on ABC. July 25. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Nobody Told the Spark It Was Over

stories.title: PGF Nationals — Bracket Play Begins Today After Two Days of Pool Play
stories.angle: Pool play is over. Bracket play means every game could be the last one. The 18U Premier field is as deep as it's been in years, and the road to the championship just got real.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Pool play is over at PGF Nationals.

Bracket play starts TODAY across Great Park Irvine and four other SoCal venues.

300+ teams. 34 states. 18U and 16U Premier.

Every game from here forward could be someone's last. #PGFNationals #softball

article.headline: The Part That Actually Matters Just Started

stories.title: AUSL Play-in Preview — Bandits vs. OKC Spark, Thursday at Davis Diamond
stories.angle: The Bandits come in on a historic run. The Spark come in as underdogs who clawed their way in on the final day. This is the best play-in matchup the AUSL could have scripted.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
AUSL Play-in Game is set:

No. 2 Chicago Bandits vs. No. 3 OKC Spark.

Thursday. July 23. 9 PM ET on ESPN at Davis Diamond.

Win-or-go-home. One game. The winner faces Utah for the Championship. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: One Game. Everything on the Line. Here Is Your AUSL Play-in Matchup.

stories.title: Megan Grant — The Season Is Over. The Year Was Extraordinary.
stories.angle: Grant's year was historic. Her season is over. Brady is still playing. The Bruins connection began 2026 as teammates and ends it on opposite sides of a playoff picture.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Megan Grant's 2026 season is over.

42 NCAA record HRs at UCLA.
8 HRs in her first AUSL season.
313-ft debut HR — AUSL distance record.
50 combined home runs in one calendar year.

Portland Cascade didn't make the playoffs.

Her year still speaks for itself. #softball #AUSL

article.headline: Fifty Home Runs. One Year. Megan Grant's 2026 Season Is Over.

stories.title: 5 Days to Davis Diamond — The AUSL Championship Bracket Is Set
stories.angle: For any fan who has just discovered the AUSL, this is everything they need to know: who's in, who's on a bye, where games are played, and why the ABC broadcast on July 25 is a moment for the history books.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The AUSL Championship bracket is set.

🗓 Thursday July 23 — Bandits vs. OKC Spark play-in, 9 PM ET ESPN
🗓 July 25-27 — Championship at Davis Diamond, College Station TX
📺 Game 1 on ABC — the first pro softball game on network TV

5 days. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Five Days to Davis Diamond. The Bracket Is Set. Here Is What You Need to Know.
